title: Asian Stocks Fall on Tech, Brent Trades Above $100: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市因科技股下跌，布伦特原油价格突破 100 美元：市场总结
summary: Asian stocks followed Wall Street lower as investors grew skeptical that the billions being poured into the artificial intelligence buildout will generate adequate returns. Brent traded above $100 a barrel.

title: Yen’s Worst Week Since May Brings It Close to 165 Versus Dollar
title_cn: 日元兑美元汇率逼近 165，创 5 月份以来最糟糕一周
summary: The yen is on track for its biggest weekly loss in more than two months, with intervention warnings doing little to deter investors betting on further weakness.

title: Singapore Pushes Back as US Levies Hit on Forced-Labor Claim
title_cn: 美国对强迫劳动索赔征​​税，新加坡予以反击
summary: Singapore’s top diplomat said there was no economic justification for the US to impose tariffs on the city-state, adding that it seeks to avoid becoming “collateral damage” in Washington’s broader trade policy.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 24
title_cn: 7 月 24 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent crude traded above $100 a barrel after Houthi attacks on tankers in the Red Sea opened a new front in the Middle East conflict, while President Donald Trump threatened to extend US strikes on Iran.

title: S. Korea Moves Up Leveraged ETF Deposit Rule to Tame Volatility
title_cn: 韩国提高杠杆 ETF 存款规则以抑制波动
summary: South Korea is moving up the date it had planned to lift the minimum cash deposit requirement for investors in leveraged exchange-traded funds to July 31, a measure to curb demand for the products that are blamed for amplifying stock volatility.

title: Gold Holds Decline as Surging Energy Costs Raise Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 能源成本飙升导致加息押注增加，金价持续下跌
summary: Gold held a retreat as the widening conflict in the Middle East pressured energy prices and increased expectations the US Federal Reserve will tighten monetary policy to contain inflation.

title: CXMT’s Frenzy Ignites Hopes of Futher Hardware Rally in China
title_cn: 长鑫存储的疯狂点燃了中国硬件进一步上涨的希望
summary: Investors are looking to Monday’s trading debut of CXMT Corp. to help renew a rally in Chinese semiconductor stocks that has been on pause ahead of the memory giant’s initial public offering.

title: CLO Price Swings Dictated by Tokyo, Wharton-Led Study Shows
title_cn: 沃顿商学院领导的研究显示，CLO 价格波动由东京决定
summary: The $1.3 trillion US CLO market is taking its cues from Tokyo as much as Wall Street.

title: Trive-Backed Lyntris Files For US IPO, Joining Defense Rush
title_cn: Trive 支持的 Lyntris 申请美国 IPO，加入国防热潮
summary: Lyntris Inc., a defense technology firm backed by Trive Capital, filed for a US initial public offering.

title: Advent to Hire Morgan Stanley to Sell Its Tigre Stake
title_cn: Advent 聘请摩根士丹利出售其 Tigre 股份
summary: Advent hired Morgan Stanley to explore a potential sale of its stake in Tigre SA, a Brazilian manufacturer of pipe and hydraulic systems, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Overseas Buyers In Hot Pursuit of US Crude as Wars Escalate
title_cn: 随着战争升级，海外买家热捧美国原油
summary: An uptick in Asian and European demand for US crude is among the first signs of mounting concerns over adequate oil supplies amid multiplying geopolitical flashpoints.

title: GIC Posts Worst Five-Year Return Since 2013; US Still Top Market
title_cn: GIC 公布自 2013 年以来最差五年回报率；美国仍是最大市场
summary: Singaporean sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte reported its lowest five-year annualized return in more than a decade, after the giant investor reduced some of its risks earlier on and its bond holdings didn’t fully rebound.

title: Goldman Offers Way to Trade AI Junk Bonds $250 Million at a Time
title_cn: 高盛提供一次交易 2.5 亿美元人工智能垃圾债券的方法
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and JPMorgan Chase & Co. launched products this week allowing investors to quickly cut — or ramp up — exposure to tech industry debt, as concerns mount over hyperscalers’ huge future bond sales for artificial intelligence investments.

title: Wellington Is Passing on Data-Center Debt Deals on Property Value Concerns
title_cn: 出于对财产价值的担忧，惠灵顿正在放弃数据中心债务交易
summary: Data-center debt risks are rising, there’s uncertainty over what the properties are worth and returns are falling, according to Wellington Management.

title: Tesla Short Sellers Rake In $4 Billion as Shares Nosedive
title_cn: 特斯拉股价暴跌，卖空者吸金 40 亿美元
summary: The deep plunge in Tesla Inc.’s stock on Thursday is turning into a major payday for its short sellers.

title: S&P 500 Suffers Worst Day in a Month as Oil Soars Over $100
title_cn: 油价飙升超过 100 美元，标准普尔 500 指数遭遇一个月来最糟糕的一天
summary: US stocks tumbled, with the S&P 500 Index suffering its worst day in a month, as doubts about whether the debt-fueled artificial-intelligence investment boom will pay off dragged down big tech stocks.

title: Heat Worries US Wheat Farmers Just as Crop Prices Surge
title_cn: 农作物价格飙升之际，炎热天气令美国小麦农民担忧
summary: For farmers in North Dakota surveying their wheat as harvest closes in, scorching heat is threatening yields just as crop prices rise to a three-year high.

title: Magnificent 7 Lose $797 Billion as AI Skeptics Dump Tech Stocks
title_cn: AI 怀疑论者抛售科技股，Magnificent 7 损失 7970 亿美元
summary: Wall Street is growing increasingly concerned about the hundreds of billions of dollars Big Tech is spending on artificial intelligence just as the resurgence of the war in Iran clouds the global macroeconomic outlook.

title: Stocks Hit by AI and War Jitters as Oil Tops $100: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 油价突破 100 美元，股市受到人工智能和战争恐慌的打击：市场总结
summary: A surge in oil spurred by the escalating Iran war sent stocks and bonds lower, with Wall Street also rattled by renewed concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will pay off.

title: Dollar Rises as Intensifying Iran War Lifts Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 伊朗战争加剧提升加息押注，美元上涨
summary: The dollar jumped Thursday as intensifying conflict in the Middle East sparked concerns over energy supply disruptions, fueling expectations that interest rates will stay higher for longer.

title: Top Environmental Fund Sees Japan Key to AI Energy Challenge
title_cn: 顶级环境基金认为日本是应对人工智能能源挑战的关键
summary: Asia’s best-performing environmental fund has increased exposure to Japan as it expects the nation’s technology sector to prove increasingly pivotal in solving the artificial intelligence industry’s surging power demands.

title: Intel’s AI-Fueled Forecast Shows Comeback Is Gaining Steam
title_cn: 英特尔人工智能驱动的预测显示卷土重来正在加速
summary: Intel Corp. delivered a revenue forecast that shattered Wall Street estimates as booming data center spending fuels a long-awaited turnaround.

title: Robotics Startup Genesis in Talks to Raise About $500 Million
title_cn: 机器人初创公司 Genesis 正在洽谈融资约 5 亿美元
summary: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the efforts.

title: Nvidia Signs $1.5 Billion Accord With Amkor for Chip Packaging
title_cn: Nvidia 与 Amkor 签署 15 亿美元芯片封装协议
summary: Nvidia Corp. signed a $1.5 billion agreement with Amkor Technology Inc. to help bolster the company’s chip packaging facilities, part of a broader push to expand semiconductor operations in the US.

title: SK Hynix Billionaire to Get Long-Awaited Ruling on Divorce Case
title_cn: SK海力士亿万富翁离婚案将获得期待已久的裁决
summary: SK Hynix Inc. billionaire Chey Tae-won is set to receive a fresh court ruling on a long-running divorce dispute with his former wife, bringing their acrimonious legal battle closer to a conclusion.

title: Tech Bonds Hit by Selloff as AI Debt Fears Race Through Markets
title_cn: 由于人工智能债务担忧席卷市场，科技债券遭受抛售
summary: The bonds of some of the biggest US tech companies slid Thursday amid renewed worries about the scale of the debt-fueled artificial-intelligence boom and escalating conflict in the Middle East.

title: Amazon Investigated Over Chinese Influence by Senate Panel
title_cn: 参议院小组调查亚马逊对中国影响力的调查
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is being investigated by the Senate Small Business Committee for allegedly letting China influence the company’s online marketplace, according to a document reviewed by Bloomberg and two people interviewed as part of the investigation.

title: SpaceX Delays Major Flight Test Again in Post-IPO Spotlight
title_cn: SpaceX 再次推迟首次公开募股后的重大飞行测试
summary: SpaceX delayed to Friday the next major test of its massive Starship rocket after also abandoning takeoff last week, heightening the stakes for the critical milestone.

title: SAP Cloud Revenue Beats Estimates as Legacy Support Nears Cutoff
title_cn: SAP Cloud 收入超出预期，传统支持接近截止
summary: SAP SE’s cloud revenue grew at a faster pace than analysts expected as customers move away from on-premises licenses ahead of the company’s deadline to halt support for legacy software.

title: Alphabet’s Anthropic Stake Jumps to Around $124 Billion
title_cn: Alphabet 的 Anthropic 股份跃升至约 1240 亿美元
summary: The value of Alphabet Inc.’s stake in the artificial intelligence startup Anthropic PBC has soared to around $124 billion, making it one of the most lucrative bets in the company’s history.

title: Trump Expands AI Data Center Pledge in Bid to Ease Power Costs
title_cn: 特朗普扩大人工智能数据中心承诺以降低电力成本
summary: President Donald Trump on Thursday welcomed fresh commitments from power utilities and data center developers to put technology companies on the hook to pay for the electricity they need to drive energy-hungry artificial-intelligence systems.

title: A Group of Industry Powerbrokers Are Unveiling a New Definition of “Podcast”
title_cn: 一群行业权力掮客正在推出“播客”的新定义
summary: After months of secret meetings, a group of industry heavyweights are releasing a white paper codifying new podcasting frameworks

title: AMD Unveils New Products in Pursuit of $2 Trillion Market
title_cn: AMD推出新产品进军2万亿美元市场
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. announced a raft of new products for data centers that it said will outperform those from rival Nvidia Corp., aiming to make gains in a booming market for artificial intelligence computing.

title: Intel Needs More Than Blowout Earnings as Chips Rally Falters
title_cn: 随着芯片市场涨势疲软，英特尔需要的不仅仅是井喷式盈利
summary: Intel Corp. is expected to report strong second-quarter earnings after the market close, but even blowout results likely won’t be enough to reverse the stock’s July slide.

title: Google Fined €890 Million by EU Over Search, Play Store Breaches
title_cn: 谷歌因搜索、Play 商店违规被欧盟罚款 8.9 亿欧元
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google was fined a total of €890 million ($1 billion) by the European Union for violating the bloc’s Digital Markets Act, in a decision that has inflamed tensions with US President Donald Trump’s administration.

title: US to Produce Ukraine’s Magura Sea Drones for the First Time
title_cn: 美国将首次生产乌克兰马古拉海上无人机
summary: A US manufacturer is set to produce Ukraine-designed, battle-tested boat drones for the first time, as the White House bids to bolster America’s military production and expand its unmanned arsenal.

title: Drone Navigation Firms Seek New Ways Past Warzone Jamming
title_cn: 无人机导航公司寻求摆脱战区干扰的新方法
summary: GPS spoofing and other countermeasures meant to knock drones from the skies over battlefields are giving rise to novel navigation systems that will work even in the face of intense jamming.

title: Khosla Ventures in Talks to Raise $5.5 Billion in New Funds
title_cn: Khosla Ventures 正在洽谈筹集 55 亿美元新资金
summary: Early OpenAI backer Khosla Ventures is discussing raising as much as $5.5 billion for its latest set of venture investment funds, a haul that would amount to its largest fundraising event in its two-decade history, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Microsoft Replacing OpenAI Image AI Models in Powerpoint, Bing
title_cn: 微软替换 Powerpoint、Bing 中的 OpenAI 图像 AI 模型
summary: Microsoft Corp. is replacing OpenAI’s image-generating models with its own technology in popular products like PowerPoint and Bing.

title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
title_cn: 由于大型机需求下降，IBM 下调全年销售预期
summary: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

title: Trump Rebuilds Tariffs With New Levies on 60 Economies
title_cn: 特朗普对 60 个经济体重新征收关税
summary: The US will collect duties of between 10% and 12.5% on imports from most major trading partners, its biggest move yet to reconstruct President Donald Trump’s tariff wall that was pierced by the Supreme Court.

title: Trump Threatens to Intensify Attacks on Iran as Houthis Join War
title_cn: 随着胡塞武装加入战争，特朗普威胁要加强对伊朗的攻击
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to step up strikes on Iran and said he’d hold the country responsible for any further attacks by the Yemen-based Houthis on Red Sea ships, as the widening Middle East war puts new strain on global energy supplies.

title: US to Use Iran’s Frozen Funds to Pay for Ship Damage, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将使用伊朗冻结的资金来支付船只损坏费用
summary: President Donald Trump said damage to ships and cargo would be paid for by Iranian funds frozen by the US after new strikes by Houthi rebels in Yemen further strained global energy flows.

title: Cambodia’s Leader Pledges More to Tackle Evolving Scam Networks
title_cn: 柬埔寨领导人承诺加大力度打击不断发展的诈骗网络
summary: Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet pledged to step up a crackdown on transnational online scam networks, but warned the criminal syndicates are adapting by fracturing into smaller, decentralized cells across the region.

title: UN Chief Candidates Make Case for Restoring World Body’s Stature
title_cn: 联合国首席候选人为恢复世界机构的地位提出理由
summary: Six contenders vying to be the next United Nations secretary general argued their case to lead the world body at a time when conflicts in Iran, Gaza and Ukraine, as well as divisions among global powers, have deepened concerns about its effectiveness.

title: Bolsonaro Pleads to End Family Feud as Campaign Falters
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗恳求结束家庭不和，因为竞选活动陷入困境
summary: The right-wing presidential campaign of Flávio Bolsonaro swung into desperation mode on Thursday, as the Brazilian fought allegations of ties to a bank scandal, beseeched his stepmother for support and faced a new police probe.

title: US Sees Haiti in Turmoil Ahead of Potential Deportations of TPS Holders
title_cn: 美国认为海地在可能被驱逐出境之前陷入混乱
summary: Haiti remains mired in a lawless miasma even as the US is threatening to force hundreds of thousands of people who fled the Caribbean nation back home, after the Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump can terminate their special immigration status.

title: Burnham Tightens No. 10 Control on UK Economy in Power Shift
title_cn: 伯纳姆在权力转移中加强对英国经济的第十号控制
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham’s push to take economic decision-making out of Westminster is already running up against a limit: 10 Downing Street itself.

title: Burnham Signals Devolution Intent With Northern Number 10 Office
title_cn: 伯纳姆向北方 10 号办公室发出权力下放的信号
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham will open a new branch of 10 Downing Street in north-west England on Friday in an attempt to demonstrate his vision for devolving power away from London.

title: DOJ Drops NYT Reporter Subpoenas Over Air Force One Stories
title_cn: 司法部撤销《纽约时报》记者因空军一号报道而发出的传票
summary: The Department of Justice dropped subpoenas to New York Times reporters over stories detailing security concerns with President Donald Trump’s Qatari-donated Air Force One under pressure from a federal judge.

title: US Sanctions Mexican Cartel Leader in Sweeping Drug Crackdown
title_cn: 美国制裁墨西哥贩毒集团领导人
summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against more than 50 people and businesses linked to the Jalisco Cartel, which has been accused of trafficking fentanyl and other illegal drugs into the country from Mexico.

title: Hidden Cost of Trump's USAID Cuts: Floods, Disease and Poverty
title_cn: 特朗普美国国际开发署削减开支的隐性成本：洪水、疾病和贫困
summary: The abrupt termination of an irrigation project in Kenya led to a once in a decade flood with devastating consequences.

title: US Sanctions Guernsey-Based Firm on Cuba Real Estate Investments
title_cn: 美国制裁根西岛公司的古巴房地产投资
summary: The US government added CEIBA Investments Ltd, a Guernsey-based firm that has been investing in Cuban commercial real estate since 1996, to its growing list of sanctioned entities as it ramps up its pressure on the communist-led island.

title: Republicans Sit on $1 Billion War Chest Ahead of Midterms
title_cn: 共和党在中期选举前坐拥 10 亿美元的战争基金
summary: Donald Trump’s super PAC has spent just 0.6% of its cash to help candidates.

title: Carney Says ‘Everything’s on the Table’ If US Imposes New 50% Tariffs
title_cn: 卡尼表示，如果美国征收新的 50% 关税，“一切都将摆在桌面上”
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada is weighing all options for possible retaliation if it doesn’t reach a deal with the US to avert 50% tariffs next month.

title: South African Deputy Minister Quits as $220 Billion Fund’s Chair
title_cn: 南非副部长辞去2200亿美元基金主席职务
summary: South Africa’s deputy finance minister quit as the chairman of a state-owned firm that oversees $220 billion of government pensions, days before he faced being removed from the post.

title: Italy Targets Youth Crime Under Meloni’s Law-and-Order Push
title_cn: 意大利在梅洛尼的法律和秩序推动下打击青少年犯罪
summary: The Italian government introduced measures it says are devised to combat youth crime, as it continues to sharpen its law-and-order agenda ahead of a general election next year.

title: Germany’s Merz Taps Warken for His Chief of Staff in Reshuffle
title_cn: 德国默茨任命沃肯为幕僚长进行改组
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz will appoint Health Minister Nina Warken as his new chief of staff, according to multiple local media reports, making the 47-year-old conservative the first woman to hold the post in postwar Germany.

title: US Says EU’s Google Fine, Airbus Loan Undermine Trade Stability
title_cn: 美国称欧盟谷歌罚款、空客贷款破坏贸易稳定
summary: The Trump administration vented more trade frustration with the European Union, saying its targeting of US technology companies for fines and a recent loan to Airbus SE threaten to undermine constructive negotiations.

title: US House Rebukes Trump on Iran, Votes Again to End War
title_cn: 美国众议院就伊朗问题斥责特朗普，再次投票结束战争
summary: The US House called on President Donald Trump to halt the war on Iran for the second time as a handful of Republicans crossed their own leadership to support the measure.
